title: Garrett Monson’s CV
text:
Business Analytics Student, Pre-Law, Aspiring Corporate Attorney.

garrett.t.monson@gmail.com | LinkedIn



Business Analytics student at Brigham Young University–Idaho, focused on finance, data analysis, and pre-law preparation.


Financial analysis, data visualization, spreadsheet modeling, business strategy, and analytical problem-solving.



Data-driven decision making, financial modeling, business optimization, legal strategy, and analytics applications in business.




Expected Apr. 2027 Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID :contentReferenceoaicite:0

Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics
Finance Minor, Pre-Law Emphasis
GPA: 4.0
Full Tuition Merit Scholarship
President, Speech and Debate Society
Member, Pre-Law Society and Wealth Management Society



Spreadsheet Analysis, Financial Accounting, Managerial Accounting, Business Leadership (IBC), Business Writing, Business Analytics, Data Science Programming, SQL for Analysts (planned)




Sep. 2025 – Present Teaching Assistant & Auditor, BA215, BYU-Idaho :contentReferenceoaicite:1

Mentored 40+ students in spreadsheet analysis and business logic
Provided grading support, technical guidance, and individualized mentorship
Audited TA grading to ensure consistency and fairness
Debugged and improved instructional spreadsheet models
Rebuilt student projects to demonstrate deeper analytical applications

May 2025 – June 2025 Financial Officer & Co-Founder, Natura Home :contentReferenceoaicite:2

Secured $2,338 in startup funding through structured loan proposal
Directed financial strategy, cash flow tracking, and inventory management
Built Excel dashboards to monitor performance and operations
Implemented PCI-DSS compliant financial policies
Led financial training and accountability initiatives

Nov. 2024 – Dec. 2024 Student Business Consultant, BUS 200 Capstone :contentReferenceoaicite:3

Conducted market research for a local counseling practice
Identified barriers, competitors, and growth opportunities
Developed strategic recommendations and a 2025 pro forma
Proposed budget allocations projected to increase revenue by 65%




Sep. 2025 – Jan. 2026 New Student Mentor, BYU-Idaho :contentReferenceoaicite:4

Guided 40+ incoming students through academic and social transition
Led workshops and provided one-on-one mentorship

Aug. 2022 – Sep. 2024 Volunteer Representative, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints :contentReferenceoaicite:5

Served in leadership roles for 14 months, managing teams of 6–18 volunteers
Led weekly planning meetings focused on goals and accountability
Developed communication and leadership skills in high-responsibility environments






Excel (PivotTables, dashboards, advanced functions), Power BI, Power Query, Microsoft Office, Python (pandas, letsplot), SQL (in progress)



Financial modeling, forecasting, process optimization



Professional writing, mentoring, client engagement



Team management, training, strategic planning
